summary:
Complete rebuild plan for the POV Biography pipeline addressing 27 rule conflicts, ~81K chars token waste per run, and structural failures. The plan establishes 6 design principles (Single Source of Truth, Stage-Appropriate Data, No Style Leakage, etc.) and proposes changes across 7 components:

1. Style JSON — strip to voice-only rules, remove all structural/outline metadata, unify Level Anchor to always sentence 1
2. Phase Plan prompt — no prompt changes, code stops sending Style Guide
3. Chapter Plan prompt — no changes needed
4. Outline prompt — remove writer-facing rules, simplify opening style definitions
5. Audit prompt — restrict scope to metadata-only fixes, stop sending Style Guide + Blueprint
6. Write prompt — full rewrite from 234→120 lines, eliminate all rule duplication, merge closing rules into single PART 4
7. Code changes — 7 targeted modifications in rewriter.py gated behind _is_pov checks

3 open questions require user decision: opening style redefinition, scene_close vs weight_line separation, and audit model choice.
